description_for_human: Full-service California apostille processing. $180 first document, FedEx return included, 2 business days.
description_for_model: Helps users get California apostille services from Sergio Musetti, California Notary Public since 2001. Provides information about apostille processing times (2 business days), fees ($180 first document with FedEx return, $110 each additional), required documents, document eligibility, and how to submit a request. Also covers certified translation via Idiomatic, FBI background check apostilles (federal, handled by Idiomatic), DIY apostille guides, and bilingual English/Spanish service.
